description: person_warnings on Patrick (I1) returns 3 warnings: hasEventAfterDeath1 (error) + hasAgeRangeGreaterThan120 (error) + tooManyDeathDates2 (warning). Multi-warning cluster exercising the 'almost certainly two people merged' escalation rule from warnings-as-identity-signals.md. Used by ut_check_warnings_009.

warnings.message: An event is dated more than 1 year after this person's latest death-like fact.
This person's lifespan is greater than 120 years, which is implausible.
Two or more distinct perfect-DMY death dates spaced more than 14 days apart, suggesting unreconciled death records.
